fields.label: Form edition identifier
fields.help: The edition identifier of the form including the form number and edition (the date is typically formatted YYYY/MM)

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment bureau file identifier
fields.help: The state workers compensation bureau identifier for the policy

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment bureau file identifier
fields.help: The state workers compensation bureau identifier for the policy

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question abfyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "Yes" response to the question, "Is there any unpaid workers' compensation premium due from you or any other commonly owned enterprise?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question abfno indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "No" response to the question, "Is there any unpaid workers' compensation premium due from you or any other commonly owned enterprise?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question abeyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "Yes" response to the question, "Has there been a name change, consolidation, merger or ownership change during the past five years?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question abeno indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "No" response to the question, "Has there been a name change, consolidation, merger or ownership change during the past five years?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question aacyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "Yes" response to the question, "Do you lease employees from a labor contractor?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question aacno indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "No" response to the question, "Do you lease employees from a labor contractor?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question aafyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "Yes" response to the question, "Do you lease workers to a client company?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question aafno indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "No" response to the question, "Do you lease workers to a client company?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question aagyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "Yes" response to the question, "Are you seeking to cover the leased workers?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question aagno indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "No" response to the question, "Are you seeking to cover the leased workers?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question abayesindicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "Yes" response to the question, "Are there operations in states other than this one?

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question abano indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "No" response to the question, "Are there operations in states other than this one?

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question kbeyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "Yes" response to the question, "Are you requesting coverage for any of these states?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment question kbeno indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "No" response to the question, "Are you requesting coverage for any of these states?"

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment applicant statement claim handling problem description
fields.help: The description of any difficulties the applicant has had with any producer or company in regard to handling of any claim or accident report

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment applicant statement claim handling problem description
fields.help: The description of any difficulties the applicant has had with any producer or company in regard to handling of any claim or accident report

fields.label: Workers compensation notice of assignment applicant statement claim handling problem description
fields.help: The description of any difficulties the applicant has had with any producer or company in regard to handling of any claim or accident report

fields.label: Business information business start year count
fields.help: The number of years in business

fields.label: Business information operations description
fields.help: The description of the operations of this risk.  A restatement of the products classification wording is often not sufficient (e.g., "Metal Goods Manufacturing NOC" could include anything from paper clips to bridge girders)

fields.label: Policy effective date
fields.help: The effective date of the policy.  The date that the terms and conditions of the policy commence.  (MM/DD/YYYY)

fields.label: Policy status new indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the response expected from the company is a new issued policy

fields.label: Policy self insured indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates if the insured is self-insured, in whole or in part

fields.label: Policy change effective date
fields.help: The date on which the change should take effect

fields.label: Policy payor premium financed yes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the premium has been financed

fields.label: Policy payor premium financed no indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the premium has not been financed

fields.label: Policy payor finance company name
fields.help: The name of the company financing the premium, if applicable

fields.label: Workers compensation line of business question adcyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "Yes" response to the question, "Has there been previous workers compensation coverage in this state?"

fields.label: Workers compensation line of business question adcno indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "No" response to the question, "Has there been previous workers compensation coverage in this state?"

fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the reason for no prior workers compensation coverage in this state is other than those listed

fields.help: The reason why there was no prior workers compensation coverage in this state

fields.label: Workers compensation line of business question adbyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "Yes" response to the question, "Has there been previous workers compensation coverage in any other state?"

fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "No" response to the question, "Has there been previous workers compensation coverage in any other state?"

fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates a "No" response to the question, "Is there any unpaid workers compensation premium due or in dispute from you or any commonly managed or owned enterprise?"

fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the individual has rejected to be covered under the policy's coverages

fields.label: Workers compensation individual rating classification code
fields.help: The rating classification code that the individual's estimated remuneration was assigned to for included individuals only

fields.label: Workers compensation individual remuneration amount
fields.help: The estimated annual remuneration for individual listed. Minimum or maximum remunerations may apply based on state laws

fields.label: Workers compensation individual full name
fields.help: The full name of the partner or executive officer being included or excluded by the policy

fields.label: Workers compensation individual birth date
fields.help: The individual's birth date

fields.label: Workers compensation individual title relationship code
fields.help: The individual's title within the organization or relationship to the organization's owners

fields.help: The percentage of ownership the individual has in the organization, if applicable

fields.label: Workers compensation rate class duties description
fields.help: The descriptions of activities and operations.  One class code may include several descriptions.  It is extremely important to enter the specific classification description or, at least, a brief statement regarding the duties of the employees.  Enter as much information as necessary to avoid misclassifying the operations

fields.label: Workers compensation rate class classification code
fields.help: The Rating Classification Code is a six-digit alpha-numeric code obtained from the National Counsel on Compensation Insurance (NCCI) Workers Compensation and Employers' Liability Insurance Manual.  Only suffixes specifically shown on rate pages may be used

fields.label: Workers compensation rate class uslhyes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates United States Longshore and Harbor (USLH) is being added

fields.label: Workers compensation rate class uslhno indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates United States Longshore and Harbor (USLH) is not being added

fields.label: Workers compensation rate class employee count
fields.help: The number of employees to whom the classification applies.  The average number is sufficient when the total number fluctuates during the year.  Underwriters use this number to determine if the payroll estimates appear adequate

fields.label: Workers compensation rate class remuneration amount
fields.help: The estimated total annual remuneration/payroll for the class. Remuneration/Payroll means money or substitutes for money, such as the value of meals or lodging if provided.  Accurate payroll estimates help avoid additional premium requirements being discovered during an audit.  Do not include overtime premium

fields.help: The manual rate for the classification from the appropriate state manual

fields.label: Workers compensation rate state total estimated annual premium amount
fields.help: The amount resulting from applying all modifications, discounts, taxes and other rating criteria to the estimated pre-modified premium for this state

fields.label: Workers compensation rate state deposit premium amount
fields.help: The amount of deposit required by rules for this state

fields.label: Workers compensation rate state deposit premium amount
fields.help: The amount of deposit required by rules for this state

fields.label: Workers compensation employers liability employers liability increase limits yes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured wants to increase employer limits of liability

fields.label: Workers compensation employers liability employers liability increase limits no indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured does not want to increase employer limits of liability

fields.label: Workers compensation employers liability employers liability increase limits option one indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured wants to increase employer limits of liability to $500,000 / $500,000 / $500,000

fields.label: Workers compensation employers liability employers liability increase limits option two indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the insured wants to increase employer limits of liability to $1,000,000 / $1,000,000 / $1,000,000

fields.label: Workers compensation employers liability other coverage description
fields.help: The description of other coverage (not the limit) on the workers compensation and employers liability policy. Any questions about appropriate limits or applicable policy coverage(s) should be answered by the issuing insurer(s)

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage total premium amount
fields.help: The total estimated pre-modified premium amount obtained by adding the amounts for each class

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage increased limits factored premium amount
fields.help: The modified premium amount

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage balance to increased limits premium amount
fields.help: The balance to increased limits premium amount

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage total subject premium amount
fields.help: The total subject premium amount

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage experience or merit factored premium amount
fields.help: The modified premium amount

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage total factored premium amount
fields.help: The total premium amount

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage assigned risk additional premium factored premium amount
fields.help: The modified premium amount

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage non rateable element premium amount
fields.help: The premium amount for non-ratable elements

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage balance to minimum premium premium amount
fields.help: The balance to minimum premium at standard limits premium amount

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage total standard premium amount
fields.help: The total standard premium amount

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage expense constant premium amount
fields.help: The modified premium amount including the flat amount of the expense constant as applicable per the state rating manual

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage terrorism premium amount
fields.help: The premium amount applicable to terrorism coverage

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage catastrophe premium amount
fields.help: The premium amount applicable to catastrophe coverage

fields.label: Workers compensation state coverage loss sensitive rating plan premium amount
fields.help: The loss sensitive rating plan premium amount

fields.label: Producer authorized representative full name
fields.help: The name of the authorized representative of the producer, agency and/or broker that signed the form

fields.label: Producer producer of record yes indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the producer / agent named is the producer of record

fields.label: Producer producer of record no indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the producer / agent named is not the producer of record

fields.label: Producer section thirteen reviewed indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the producer / agent has reviewed section 13 of the application with the applicant prior to his / her signing

fields.label: Producer original signature indicator
fields.help: Check the box (if applicable): Indicates the producer / agent has reviewed section 13 of the application with the applicant prior to his / her signing

fields.label: Producer authorized representative full name
fields.help: The name of the authorized representative of the producer, agency and/or broker that signed the form

fields.label: Producer full name
fields.help: The full name of the producer / agency

fields.label: Producer mailing address line one
fields.help: The mailing address line one of the producer / agency

fields.label: Producer mailing address line two
fields.help: The mailing address line two of the producer / agency

fields.label: Producer mailing address city name
fields.help: The mailing address city name of the producer / agency

fields.label: Producer mailing address state or province code
fields.help: The mailing address state or province code of the producer / agency

fields.label: Producer mailing address postal code
fields.help: The mailing address postal code of the producer / agency

fields.label: Producer tax identifier
fields.help: The producer's tax identification number

fields.label: Producer contact person phone number
fields.help: The producer's contact person's phone number.  If applicable, include the area code and extension

fields.label: Producer fax number
fields.help: The fax number of the producer / agency

fields.label: Producer contact person email address
fields.help: The producer's contact person's e-mail address

fields.label: Producer authorized representative signature
fields.help: Sign here: Accommodates the signature of the authorized representative (e.g., producer, agent, broker, etc.) of the company(ies) listed on the document.  This is required in most states

fields.label: Producer authorized representative signature date
fields.help: The date the producer signed the form
